reviews.comment:
Casi siempre cargo nafta súper aquí, la atención es buena y rápida, depende de los horarios que uno vaya pero todo bien. También hay shops para comprar golosinas, desayunar o almorzar. Baños solo para clientes.

(Translated by Google)
I almost always fill up with premium gas here. The service is good and fast, depending on the time of day, but it's all good. There are also shops where you can buy snacks, breakfast, or lunch. Restrooms are for customers only.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmdG91OWRBEAE
